productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Dazzle Shopper Black Bags
description: The puma Dazzle Shopper is a must for your next shopping spree. A clever handbag with many extra compartments, it has plenty of room for all your essentials. Length: 32 cm Made of polyester for durability and easy cleaning 3015 twill polyester lining Two-way zip opening into the main compartment Zip pocket inside with a slip in pocket and mobile phone pocket inside Roped PU carry handles with shiny black metal hardware PU tape zip pullers Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
